channel.title: My Static Website for A2
channel.description: Recent content on My Static Website for A2

item.title: README.md
item.description:
Statement of purpose

This README intends to describe the technical process used to host a Markdown-formatted resume on a statically generated website.

It will do so by connecting the technical writing methodologies and principles described in the course readings. Specifically:

  • Andrew Etter’s Modern Technical Writing, and
  • Chapter 8 of William S. Pfeiffer’s Technical Communication: A Practical Approach.

The intended audience of this README is Marvin McLaren, or anyone who is interested in technical writing and meets the technical prerequisites listed in the next section.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Harkeet Bal

204-997-6190 | balh@myumanitoba.ca | GitHub

Education

B.Sc. Computer Science, Minor in Statistics | Sept 2021 - Dec 2026

University of Manitoba | Winnipeg, MB

Awards:

  • UM Guertin Centennial Entrance Award (Tier 2)
  • Dean’s Honour List

Technical Skills

Languages: Python, SQL, Java, R, TypeScript, C#, C/C++

Frameworks: PyTorch, Apache Airflow, .NET, Vue.js, Spring Boot

Tools & Databases: Git, Docker, Oracle, Snowflake, PostgreSQL

Industry Experience

Data Engineer | Sept 2024 - Aug 2025

Richardson International | Winnipeg, MB
